title: Felucian spike plant
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Felucian_spike_plant.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A Felucian spike plant.]]
'''Felucia spike plants''' were an orangish-green colored plant indigenous to [[Felucia/Legends|Felucia]]. The dangerous plants were usually found near [[Felucian spore plant|spore plants]] and were known to release a barrage of green spikes when touched.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''

[[Category:Plants of Felucia]]
